instruction: 帮我把KPI数据整理到摘要文件里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '指标'
ws['B1'] = '目标'
ws['C1'] = '实际'
ws['D1'] = '完成率(%)'
ws['A2'] = '年度营收(万元)'
ws['B2'] = 8000
ws['C2'] = 8640
ws['D2'] = 108
ws['A3'] = '净利润率(%)'
ws['B3'] = 18
ws['C3'] = 20.5
ws['D3'] = 113.9
ws['A4'] = '新增客户(家)'
ws['B4'] = 300
ws['C4'] = 342
ws['D4'] = 114
ws['A5'] = '员工满意度(%)'
ws['B5'] = 88
ws['C5'] = 91.5
ws['D5'] = 104
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/performance_kpi.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把KPI数据整理到摘要文件里
从/home/user/Desktop/performance_kpi.xlsx中读取年度营收的完成率，追加到/home/user/Desktop/kpi_digest.txt末尾：'年度营收完成率：108%（实际8640万元）'，保存

include: 年度营收完成率：108%（实际8640万元）
